title: Understanding Transfer Pricing Fundamentals
subtitle: A 1-day HRD Corp-claimable finance workshop for applying understanding transfer pricing fundamentals more confidently at work.
whyThisMatters: Understanding Transfer Pricing Fundamentals helps managers, finance support teams, and business users understand understanding transfer pricing fundamentals in practical workplace terms. The session connects Finance Context and Business Impact, Reading Information and Key Controls, and Cost, Risk, and Decision-Making to better financial decisions, controls, and business conversations.
builtFor: Department heads responsible for budgets, records, or controls
Business owners who want stronger financial awareness
walkAwayWith: Understand the key financial concepts and business implications.
Read information with clearer awareness of cost, risk, and performance.
Ask better questions when reviewing records, reports, or decisions.
Use finance thinking to support planning and follow-through.
methodologyCaption: The session uses practical business examples and guided exercises so participants can apply financial thinking to workplace decisions.
